arts.ttl: Feyenoord loan Gjivai Zechiël to Sparta Rotterdam for the remainder of the season
arts.sum: Feyenoord's Gjivai Zechiël (20) will finish the season on loan at city rivals Sparta Rotterdam, the club he spent six years at as an academy player.

arts.ttl: Le Havre’s Oussama Targhalline set to join Feyenoord
arts.sum: Le Havre AC midfielder Oussama Targhalline (22) is set to join Feyenoord, according to a report from Foot Mercato. Whilst the transfer window in France has now closed, Dutch sides are…

arts.ttl: “I Have the Same Fiery Spirit as Milan” – Santiago Gimenez’s Passionate Journey to AC Milan
arts.sum: Santiago Gimenez, AC Milan's new star striker, has been officially presented at Casa Milan following his €35 million transfer from Feyenoord. The 23-year-old Mexican forward joins the Rossoneri as part of their impressive winter transfer campaign, which also saw the arrivals of Joao Felix, Kyle Walker, Warren Bondo, and Riccardo Sottil. The post “I Have the Same Fiery Spirit as Milan” – Santiago Gimenez’s Passionate Journey to AC Milan appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: PSV see Man City cut youngster’s loan period short for Forest move
arts.sum: Joel Ndala (18) has left his PSV loan prematurely to return to Manchester City and join Nottingham Forest on a loan-to-buy move.

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi 17th & Mohamed Salah 3rd - The most valuable players out of contract in 2025
arts.sum: With the dust now beginning to settle after a dramatic January transfer window, football clubs and their respective fans will be turning their attention towards deals that can be made in the summer...

arts.ttl: Santiago Gimenez: “Milan Was Always My Dream”
arts.sum: AC Milan's latest signing Santiago Gimenez has expressed his excitement about joining the Rossoneri, describing it as a dream come true. The post Santiago Gimenez: “Milan Was Always My Dream” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: What Nottingham Forest have planned for Joel Ndala as shock deadline day deal is announced
USMNT transfer grades: From PSV's Ricardo Pepi and Dortmund's Gio Reyna to Holstein Kiel's John Tolkin and Austin FC's Brandon Vazquez, which Americans got it right?
arts.sum: GOAL grades every USMNT player who moved during the winter transfer window and, just as important, those who stayed For most USMNT players, the January window was just as much about the transfers that didn't happen as the ones that did.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano: Nottingham Forest Agree Last-Minute Loan Signing
arts.sum: In the latter stages of Deadline Day, Nottingham Forest have completed the loan signing of Manchester City youngster Joel Ndala.

arts.ttl: Man Utd defender Malacia close to PSV loan move
arts.sum: Dutch defender Tyrell Malacia is close to joining PSV Eindhoven on loan from Manchester United until the end of the season.
